examples: Every year, Hindus greet the turn of winter into spring with a splash of color—in some areas, a geyser of color.
A geyser of gas and liquid erupted.
Old Faithful Geyser erupts approximately every 91 minutes.
We followed the Geyser River toward the vaulting spouts and red-yellow soils of the great Stained Glass geysers.
Last summer an 83-year-old pipe in Manhattan burst, sending a geyser of steam and debris into the air.
